title: The Shattered Crown of Elderglen

world_bible.magic_rules: Magic is rare and tied to ancient relics. Only those bearing a relic can cast spells, and each relic has a unique power with limited uses per day.
world_bible.tone: Mysterious and adventurous with a sense of fading grandeur.
world_bible.anachronism_policy: Strictly medieval setting; no modern or futuristic elements allowed.

locations.name: Elderglen Village
locations.description: A quiet village nestled in the foothills, known for its skilled herbalists and rumors of an old crown hidden in the nearby ruins.

locations.name: Whispering Woods
locations.description: An ancient forest where the trees murmur secrets. Travelers often get lost without a guide.

locations.name: Stonebridge Ford
locations.description: A sturdy stone bridge crossing the Silverstream River, guarded by a retired knight.

locations.name: Ruins of Vaelthorn
locations.description: Crumbling ruins of a once-great fortress, now infested with shadow creatures and traps.

locations.name: Highcliff Keep
locations.description: A noble's keep perched on a cliff, currently hosting a gathering of regional lords to discuss the missing crown.

npcs.name: Elara
npcs.refusal_style: I’d help if I could, but this is too dangerous for you.

npcs.name: Borin
npcs.refusal_style: Not unless you’ve got coin or steel to trade.

npcs.name: Liora
goals: explore every corner of the woods
earn enough to buy a boat
npcs.refusal_style: Only if you promise not to slow me down!

npcs.name: Thorne
npcs.refusal_style: The woods don’t need your kind.

npcs.name: Sir Gareth
npcs.refusal_style: I’ll aid you if your cause is just.

npcs.name: Mira
npcs.refusal_style: Only if you bring me luck—or bait!

npcs.name: Varn
goals: reclaim the crown for the cult
npcs.refusal_style: You’re already dead—you just don’t know it yet.

npcs.name: Lady Isolde
goals: secure the crown for her house
npcs.refusal_style: Prove your worth, and perhaps I’ll consider it.

npcs.name: Roland
npcs.refusal_style: Of course! Just let me ask my lady first…

starting_hook: You arrive in Elderglen Village seeking work, only to hear whispers of the Shattered Crown—a relic said to grant its bearer the right to rule all the lands. The local herbalist, Elara, believes you might be the one to recover it before dark forces do.
initial_quest: Speak with Elara in Elderglen Village to learn more about the Shattered Crown.

main_quest.title: The Shattered Crown
main_quest.description: Main progression requires completing side quests and obtaining their reward items.
main_quest.objective: Finish side quests and collect key items: crown_fragment_of_the_whispering_grove x1, crown_fragment_of_silverstream x1, crown_fragment_of_vaelthorn x1
main_quest.reward_hint: The reforged crown will grant you authority over the land—or the power to destroy it.

side_quests.title: Herbs for Healing
side_quests.description: Elara needs rare herbs to treat a sickness spreading through the village.
side_quests.objective: Gather moonpetal_bloom and silverleaf from the Whispering Woods.
side_quests.reward_hint: Elara reveals she found this fragment while foraging near the sacred grove.

side_quests.title: The Fisher’s Bargain
side_quests.description: Mira will trade a valuable item if you help her appease the river spirits.
side_quests.objective: Retrieve riverglass_shard and glowing_minnow from Stonebridge Ford.
side_quests.reward_hint: Mira says the fragment was caught in her net during a stormy night.

side_quests.title: Secrets of the Ruins
side_quests.description: Liora wants to explore the Ruins of Vaelthorn but fears the traps. She’ll reward you if you retrieve something valuable.
side_quests.objective: Find obsidian_key and shadowvine from the Ruins of Vaelthorn.
side_quests.reward_hint: Liora discovered the fragment hidden in a secret chamber beneath the altar.
